content_angle: Cold-water season transition: as NZ shifts into autumn and pool training ramps up post-summer ocean swims, spotlight the performance science behind training in cooler water — how it affects stroke efficiency, breathing patterns, and suit selection — tying Velocx technical fabric benefits to a real seasonal challenge competitive swimmers face right now.
key_insight: Authenticity-led content anchored to a timely seasonal hook — NZ's autumn open water-to-pool transition — is the highest-engagement format for competitive swimming brands in 2026, making it an ideal and unused angle for Velocx.
